name: SiteDirectoryConfig
description: Configuration for the Site directory plugin: a gallery of saved websites with an optional 'New site' action.

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Heading shown above the gallery. Defaults to 'Websites'.

attributes.name: entityType
attributes.description: Entity type to list. Defaults to the builder Site type (PLUGINS:dm-core-plugins/builder/Site).

attributes.name: dataSources
attributes.description: Data sources to search. Defaults to the application's visible data sources.

attributes.name: targetDataSource
attributes.description: DMSS address (usually a data source root) where 'New site' creates the entity. Defaults to the first searched data source; when absent the create button is hidden.

attributes.name: viewUrlTemplate
attributes.description: URL opened when visiting a site. {id} and {dataSource} are substituted. Defaults to '/view?documentId=dmss://{dataSource}/{id}'.

attributes.name: newSiteUrlTemplate
attributes.description: URL opened right after 'New site' creates a site (empty sites usually open in the editor, e.g. append '&recipe=Edit'). {id} and {dataSource} are substituted. Falls back to viewUrlTemplate.

attributes.name: newSiteName
attributes.description: Name given to a site created via 'New site'. Defaults to 'New site'.

attributes.name: allowCreate
attributes.description: Set false to hide the 'New site' button (a read-only gallery).
